SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT AND WAS ASSISTED BY VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER HONG HA. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VO, TAI THANH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT M.Y.T. CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
